raw_transcript: Don't be embarrassed; that's actually a vital clinical sign called steatorrhea. It means your pancreas isn't producing enough enzymes to break down the fats in your food. We've had you on Creon, 24,000 units with meals. Are you taking it with every single snack and meal?
final_corrected_note: Don't be embarrassed; that's actually a vital clinical sign called steatorrhea. It means your pancreas isn't producing enough enzymes to break down the fats in your food. We've had you on Creon, 24,000 units with meals. Are you taking it with every single snack and meal?
